requirement_topic.en: EMC and wireless compliance — SDPPI type approval and radio limits
requirement_topic.zh: EMC 与无线合规——SDPPI 型式认可与无线限制
requirement_topic.zht: EMC 與無線合規——SDPPI 型式認可與無線限制

summary.en: When lithium power banks or battery-powered packs include wireless transmit/receive functions, Indonesia applies telecommunications and radio requirements under SDPPI. Type approval and technical evidence for EMC behavior and RF exposure limits are required before market placement in the relevant range. Where SNI safety testing already covers core electrical safety, wireless emissions and radio compatibility are still assessed through the communications authority path and are not automatically fulfilled by Chinese domestic EMC reports.
summary.zh: 当锂电池、移动电源或电池组产品具有无线收发功能时，印尼需按 SDPPI 的通信与无线要求办理型式认可以及相关电磁兼容和射频辐射行为证据后方可进入市场。即使 SNI 已覆盖安全测试，含无线功能产品的无线排放与兼容仍按通信监管路径单独评估，中国国内 EMC 报告不能自动替代。
summary.zht: 當鋰電池、行動電源或電池組產品具有無線收發功能時，印尼需按 SDPPI 的通訊與無線要求辦理型式認可及相關電磁相容和射頻輻射行為證據後方可進入市場。即使 SNI 已覆蓋核心安全測試，含無線功能產品的無線排放與兼容仍按通訊監管路徑單獨評估，中國國內 EMC 報告不能自動替代。

standards_or_laws: SDPPI type approval rules for radio and telecom modules in electronic products
Indonesian EMC and radio coexistence requirements for approved wireless products
BSN conformity documents where product scope also triggers mandatory SNI

summary.en: China applies GB/T EMC standards and domestic telecom equipment approvals for CE-marked or domestic marketing channels depending on product class, including radiocommunication requirements from MIIT-linked procedures. These frameworks do not replace SDPPI type-approval for Indonesia.
summary.zh: 中国按 GB/T EMC 标准及国内电信审批流程（含通信管理要求）处理不同类目产品，具体依据 MIIT 路径和产品类别。该体系不构成印尼 SDPPI 型式认可的替代。
summary.zht: 中國按 GB/T EMC 標準及國內電信審批流程（含通訊管理要求）處理不同類別產品，具體依據 MIIT 路徑及產品類別。該體系不構成印尼 SDPPI 型式認可的替代。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 17625 series for EMC safety and emissions
MIIT telecom equipment approval framework where applicable
China RoHS and CCC-related product controls where category-defined

gap.en: The China technical EMC or telecom evidence is relevant but not sufficient. For Indonesian entry, wireless-enabled power banks need SDPPI pathway documentation, including any required mark and certificate references, before sale. CN certificates from domestic telecom routes are treated as separate domestic compliance instruments.
gap.zh: 中国 EMC 或电信证据虽有技术参考价值，但不足以独立完成印尼要求。带无线功能的移动电源仍需通过 SDPPI 路径提交相应文件和标识/证书后方可销售。中国国内通讯路线的证书属于独立的国内合规文件。
gap.zht: 中國 EMC 或電信證據雖有技術參考價值，但不足以單獨完成印尼要求。帶無線功能的行動電源仍需通過 SDPPI 路徑提交相應文件和標識／證書後方可銷售。中國國內通訊路徑的證書屬於獨立的國內合規文件。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory where product uses radiocommunication or wireless functions. SDPPI approval and related compliance evidence are required before Indonesian market placement.
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory domestic telecom and EMC reporting may apply for Chinese domestic sales; there is no equivalent automatic recognition route in Indonesia

source.publisher: Satuan Kerja Pengkajian dan Penelitian Industri / SDPPI

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Indonesian wireless products should be treated as a separate compliance branch. SDPPI type approval is the governing route for radio functions and cannot be replaced by China-only EMC/MIIT domestic documentation. CHinese reports can support engineering review but do not close the Indonesian approval obligation.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 带无线功能的产品应视为独立分支合规。印尼的 SDPPI 型式认可是该项的主导合规路径，不能被中国本土的 EMC 或 MIIT 文件替代。中国的检测报告可用于工程支持，但不足以完成印尼审批义务。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 帶無線功能的產品應視為獨立分支合規。印尼的 SDPPI 型式認可是該項的主導合規路徑，不能被中國本土的 EMC 或 MIIT 文件替代。中國的檢測報告可用於工程支持，但不足以完成印尼審批義務。
